description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs that triggers on push to the master branch. For a specific repository owner, run a multi-step job on ubuntu-latest that checks out code, sets up .NET Core 3.1.300 and Node.js 10.x, publishes documentation, deploys to GitHub Pages and Github.io, packages a nightly NuGet package, publishes it to NuGet, syncs the repository to Gitee, and reloads Gitee Pages.
